Package com.hp.workpath.api.printer

Provides interfaces for handling a print job

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes
    The sets of credentials attributes related with authentication parameters to get a file for printing by device over network.
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating NetworkCredentialsAttributes containing credentials.
    PrintAttributes
    The sets of attributes for requesting a print. An instance of this class is created using one of the builders.
    PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T extends PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T>>
    Base builder for common print attributes
    PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder
    Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an image residing on the external server and available by HTTP(S) URL.
    PrintAttributes.PrintFromStorageBuilder
    Builder for creating PrintAttributes to print the files from source.
    PrintAttributes.PrintFromStreamBuilder
    Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an data from provided input stream.
    PrintAttributes.PrintFromUsbBuilder
    Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an file residing on the external USB storage.
    PrintAttributesCaps
    Sets of attributes provided by the device when requesting a print.
    PrintAttributesReader
    Reads attributes which are requesting of a print from the device
    PrinterService
    PrinterService provides an easy to use interface to initiate printing related built-in tasks.
    PrinterStatus
    PrinterStatus provides an interface to retrieve device status details
    PrintletAttributes
    Attributes to determine behavior after submitting print job.
    PrintletAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating an instance of PrintletAttributes.
    StatusInfo
    Provides status details of the printer
    TrayInfo
    Provides the tray info from device.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    PrintAttributes.AutoFit
    A collection of the configuration of auto fit
    PrintAttributes.CollateMode
    A collection of Collate
    PrintAttributes.ColorMode
    A collection of the color mode for printing.
    PrintAttributes.DocumentFormat
    A collection of Document Format
    PrintAttributes.Duplex
    A collection of duplex mode for printing.
    PrintAttributes.Finishings
    A collection of finishings
    PrintAttributes.Orientation
    A collection of Orientation
    PrintAttributes.OutputBin
    A collection of OutputBin
    PrintAttributes.PaperSize
    A collection of Paper Size
    PrintAttributes.PaperSource
    A collection of Paper Source
    PrintAttributes.PaperType
    A collection of Paper Type
    PrintAttributes.PrintQuality
    A collection of Print-quality (IPP values - draft: 3, Normal: 4, High: 5)
    PrintAttributes.Source
    The source for file to print.
    PrintAttributes.StapleMode
    A collection of Staple Mode, this option will be ignored if Finishings option is enabled
    StatusInfo.Status
    Printer status
    StatusInfo.StatusReason
    A collection of status from a device
    TrayInfo.Status
    Tray status (available to be used for printing or not)

Package com.hp.workpath.api.printer Description

Provides interfaces for handling a print job
